items.title: Amazon Cognito
items.description: AWS Cognito for DVA-C02 — User Pools vs Identity Pools, JWT tokens, hosted UI, federation with social providers, Cognito Sync, and all common exam patterns. Java SDK examples included.

items.title: API Authentication & Authorization
items.description: OAuth 2.0 flows, JWT structure and validation, API keys, mTLS, OIDC, token introspection, and Spring Security integration.

items.title: Authentication & Authorization
items.description: Deep dive into authentication and authorization patterns including sessions, JWT, OAuth 2.0, OIDC, RBAC, ABAC, MFA, passwordless, passkeys, and Spring Security implementation.

items.title: Database Security
items.description: Authentication, authorization, SQL injection, encryption at rest and in transit, auditing, and security best practices.

items.title: Security Knowledge Base
items.description: A comprehensive security reference for software engineers covering authentication, authorization, cryptography, web vulnerabilities, privacy, compliance, secure SDLC, and incident response.

items.title: Security Patterns
items.description: Security design patterns for distributed systems including authentication, authorization, JWT, OAuth 2.0, rate limiting, zero trust, secrets management, and OWASP top threats.

items.title: Spring Security — Complete Guide
items.description: Comprehensive guide to Spring Security, including authentication, authorization, filter chains, and common application security patterns.

items.title: Top Spring Security Interview Questions and Answers
items.description: A comprehensive guide covering the most important and tricky Spring Security interview questions, including OAuth2, JWT, CORS, CSRF, and method-level security.
